building_row.management_company: Greystar California, Inc. dba Greystar Corp.
building_row.open_questions: Confirm controlled-access setup, exact package handling flow, EV charging, dishwasher availability, and whether an interior non-Santa-Monica-facing unit materially reduces noise.
building_row.notes: The Charlie looks strong on paper for basics like in-unit laundry, AC, garage parking, rooftop pool, fitness, coworking-style lobby space, and cat-friendly terms. The main problem for your priorities is the Santa Monica Blvd location plus rooftop social space and ground-floor retail, with Apartments.com showing a Busy SoundScore and no renter reviews yet. Greystar management and fee disclosures are visible, but operational confidence is still limited because public resident-review depth remains thin and access-control details are not clearly disclosed on the official site.

evidence_rows.claim: The official site markets coworking-style lobby space, a rooftop pool and dining area, and a fitness center.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Official amenities section describes an open hotel-esque lobby with creative coworking opportunities, plus rooftop pool, dining, entertainment, and a modern fitness center.

evidence_rows.claim: The official availability page discloses that displayed rents are base rent only and that additional fees may apply.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Page says prices shown are base rent and directs renters to add Essentials and Personalized Add-Ons; it also notes additional fees may apply for package delivery, trash, water, and amenities.

evidence_rows.claim: Greystar is publicly identified as the manager on both the official availability page and Greystar listing.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Greystar listing identifies the property and official site also names Greystar California, Inc. dba Greystar Corp. as manager.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com confirms in-unit washer and dryer and air conditioning.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Apartment Features section lists Washer/Dryer and Air Conditioning.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com discloses pet deposit, pet rent, garage parking pricing, and package-service fees.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Fees page lists refundable pet deposit of $500, pet rent of $50 per month, garage parking at $150 to $200 per month, package services registration at $15, and package services at $3.

evidence_rows.claim: Apartments.com shows a Busy SoundScore and no renter reviews yet, which limits confidence and points to location noise risk.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Listing shows SoundScore 62 with Traffic Busy and Businesses Busy, and Property Ratings section says No Renter Reviews Yet.

evidence_rows.claim: Urbanize reports the building was developed as a new mixed-use project with 71 apartments over ground-floor retail and a large garage.
evidence_rows.quote_or_note: Urbanize project page states 71 apartments with ground-floor retail and 177 parking spaces in a semi-subterranean garage, reinforcing a mixed-use corridor setting rather than a purely residential one.

# The Charlie WeHo building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: the-charlie-weho-7617-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 7617 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://thecharlieweho.com/
- Management company: Greystar California, Inc. dba Greystar Corp.
- Recommended status: research_complete
- Last updated: 2026-03-25

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 4)
- Management: 3 (low, evidence count 3)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 6)
- Community stability: 3 (low, evidence count 3)
- Location fit: 5
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: medium
- Location noise risk: high
- Security risk: medium
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official site markets coworking-style lobby space, rooftop pool and dining, and fitness center. Source: The Charlie WeHo official site (https://thecharlieweho.com/). Note: open hotel-esque lobby with creative coworking opportunities plus rooftop pool, dining, entertainment, and modern fitness center.
- [official] Official availability page says listed rents are base rent and additional fees may apply. Source: The Charlie WeHo availability page (https://thecharlieweho.com/availability/). Note: page points renters to Essentials and Personalized Add-Ons and mentions package, trash, water, and amenity charges.
- [official] Greystar is publicly identified as manager. Source: Greystar property page (https://www.greystar.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/p_20735). Note: management identity is clear, but operational resident signal is still thin.
- [review] Apartments.com confirms in-unit washer/dryer and AC. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/clgxc7f/). Note: strong match for core essentials except dishwasher remains unconfirmed in visited sources.
- [review] Apartments.com discloses pet deposit, pet rent, garage parking, and package-service charges. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/clgxc7f/). Note: fee transparency is better than average.
- [review] Apartments.com shows Busy SoundScore 62 and no renter reviews yet. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/the-charlie-weho-west-hollywood-ca/clgxc7f/). Note: weak quiet signal for a quiet-first search and limited resident evidence.
- [news] Urbanize describes a 71-unit mixed-use project with ground-floor retail and substantial parking. Source: Urbanize LA (https://la.urbanize.city/project/7617-santa-monica). Note: reinforces corridor activity and mixed-use character.

## Open questions
- Confirm controlled-access setup, exact package handling flow, EV charging, dishwasher availability, and whether an interior non-Santa-Monica-facing unit materially reduces noise.

## Notes
The Charlie is attractive on amenities and fee disclosure, but it does not yet clear your quiet-first bar confidently. It looks better as a watchlist or secondary tour option than as a front-runner until there is stronger resident evidence and a verified quiet interior unit.
